prestazioni: K20A 2.0L i-VTEC engine: Full forged internals including JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1,000+ hp capability with forced induction. Paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Hypertune.

Fuel system upgrade: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with AN-6 lines to prevent oil dilution in the K20A’s high-revving environment. Custom ECU reflash via Hondata KPro V4 with launch control and traction control disabled for full manual control.

Drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with 85% lockup under power, reinforced PPG close-ratio 6-speed gearbox with Quaife synchros, and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with cerametallic friction discs. Custom chromoly driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop rated for 800+ lb-ft torque.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (FD2-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and hood vents. OEM+ JDM-spec rear winker delete with custom LED strips integrated into the rear bumper.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front springs and 10kg/mm rear springs, custom camber plates by Buddy Club, and Hardrace adjustable toe arms. Front strut bar replaced with a Cusco Type RS 2-point strut tower bar (22mm hollow steel) for chassis rigidity.

Wheels: Volk Racing TE37SL in 17x9.5 +22 front and 17x10.5 +30 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear). Custom titanium wheel studs by Project Kics and lightweight aluminum lug nuts by Muteki.
